recommendations.title: Annie Hall
recommendations.overview: New York comedian Alvy Singer falls in love with the ditsy Annie Hall.

recommendations.title: Husbands and Wives
recommendations.overview: When their best friends announce that they're separating, a professor and his wife discover the faults in their own marriage.

recommendations.title: Manhattan
recommendations.overview: Manhattan explores how the life of a middle-aged television writer dating a teenage girl is further complicated when he falls in love with his best friend's mistress.

recommendations.title: The Age of Innocence
recommendations.overview: In 19th century New York high society, a young lawyer falls in love with a woman separated from her husband, while he is engaged to the woman's cousin.

recommendations.title: Stardust Memories
recommendations.overview: While attending a retrospect of his work, a filmmaker recalls his life and his loves: the inspirations for his films.

recommendations.title: The Godfather Part II
recommendations.overview: In the continuing saga of the Corleone crime family, a young Vito Corleone grows up in Sicily and in 1910s New York. In the 1950s, Michael Corleone attempts to expand the family business into Las Vegas, Hollywood and Cuba.

recommendations.title: After Hours
recommendations.overview: Desperate to escape his mind-numbing routine, uptown Manhattan office worker Paul Hackett ventures downtown for a hookup with a mystery woman.

recommendations.title: Mean Streets
recommendations.overview: A small-time hood must choose from among love, friendship and the chance to rise within the mob.

recommendations.title: Everyone Says I Love You
recommendations.overview: A New York girl sets her father up with a beautiful woman in a shaky marriage while her half sister gets engaged.

recommendations.title: Taxi Driver
recommendations.overview: Suffering from insomnia, disturbed loner Travis Bickle takes a job as a New York City cabbie, haunting the streets nightly, growing increasingly detached from reality as he dreams of cleaning up the filthy city.
